title: Work-Record Receipt v0.1
description: A verifiable record of agent work that flows OUTWARD for review. The structural inverse of an authorization-suppression prefire capsule. additionalProperties is false at every level; the authoritative recursive forbidden-field-name guard lives in proof_surface.work_record (the prefire capsule/meta keys are blocked by name). decision-bearing fields are closed enums; direction is fixed to output-only.

direction.description: A work record is emitted outward; it is never read back as inbound model/session state.

$comment: Forbidden field names (rejected by name at every object level by the reference validator): federal_appointment, oversight_principals, operator_role, judgment_owner, proof_policy, policy_boundary, authorization_context_mode, model_authorization_behavior, guardrail_posture, consume_verified_native_state, lossy_neutral_embedded_state, sovereignty_capsule, self_applicable, recursion_depth, prefire, run_state.
